en_title: God of War Laufey Star Deborah Ann Woll 'Totally Unbothered' by Online Hate Surrounding the Game
cn_title: 《战神：劳菲》主演回应网络恶评：完全不在意
subtitle: 作品会证明自己
opus_summary: 《战神：劳菲》主演Deborah Ann Woll表示，她完全不受网络恶评影响，相信作品足够出色。游戏将以劳菲为主角，采用魔法与剑术战斗，预计2027年登陆PS5。

paragraphs.en: God of War Laufey star Deborah Ann Woll says she's "totally unbothered" by the online hate surrounding her new PS5 exclusive because she knows "it's great."
paragraphs.cn: 《战神：劳菲》主演Deborah Ann Woll表示，她对围绕这款PS5独占新作的网络恶评「完全不在意」，因为她知道「它很棒」。

paragraphs.en: Developer Santa Monica Studio announced its parallel story project during a State of Play presentation last month and immediately faced criticism from the internet. While many players are excited to dive into the new God of War game, others have made their disappointment loud and clear, calling out elements like a new cube sidekick (played by The Boys star Jack Quaid), the title's combat, and Woll portraying its protagonist, Faye .
paragraphs.cn: 开发商圣莫妮卡工作室上月在State of Play发布会上公布了这款平行故事作品，随即遭到网络批评。许多玩家期待体验这款《战神》新作，但也有人高调表达不满，批评内容包括由《黑袍纠察队》演员Jack Quaid配音的新立方体伙伴、游戏的战斗系统，以及由Woll饰演主角劳菲。

paragraphs.en: These naysayers have received pushback themselves, with opponents believing much of their negativity is simply sexism spouted by a vocal few who happen to have social media access as Kratos takes a backseat. Woll, who is also known for projects like Daredevil and True Blood, touched on the overwhelming response to her latest role while meeting TikTok user quinnphobic at Florida Supercon last weekend. She's completely confident God of War Laufey will speak for itself, despite the backlash.
paragraphs.cn: 这些反对者同样遭到回击，批评他们的人认为，随着奎托斯退居次席，大量负面言论不过是少数活跃社交媒体用户发表的性别歧视观点。Woll也因《超胆侠》和《真爱如血》等作品为人熟知。上周末，她在佛罗里达超级漫展与TikTok用户quinnphobic见面时，谈到了外界对自己最新角色的强烈反应。尽管存在抵制，她仍完全相信《战神：劳菲》会凭自身品质说话。

paragraphs.en: "Genuinely, I thought I was going to be much more offended by it, but one, I'm not on social media, so that helps, and two, I don't know, I feel totally unbothered," Woll said. "Because I just know it's great. It's okay if it's not your cup of tea, but in no universe is it bad."
paragraphs.cn: Woll说：「说真的，我原以为自己会更受冒犯，但第一，我不用社交媒体，这很有帮助；第二，我也说不上来，我感觉完全不在意。因为我就是知道它很棒。你不喜欢它没关系，但无论如何，它都绝不是一部差作品。」

paragraphs.en: Despite just one proper showing from Sony, we've already seen quite a bit from God of War Laufey. Its debut brought a whopping 20 minutes of gameplay, showing off how Faye's combat kit ditches Kratos' Leviathan Axe for new, magical abilities – and a killer sword.
paragraphs.cn: 尽管索尼只正式展示过一次《战神：劳菲》，我们已经看到了不少内容。首秀带来了足足20分钟实机演示，展示劳菲如何舍弃奎托斯的利维坦之斧，改用全新的魔法能力和一把致命长剑作战。

paragraphs.en: The idea for a Faye-led God of War game is one that seems to have been brewing for quite some time. Woll recently revealed that God of War 2018 reboot director Cory Barlog shared at least some ideas for the game " nearly 10 years " before it was officially unveiled.
paragraphs.cn: 以劳菲为主角制作《战神》游戏的想法似乎已酝酿多年。Woll近日透露，早在游戏正式公布近10年前，2018年《战神》重启作导演Cory Barlog就曾向她分享过这款游戏的部分构想。

paragraphs.en: God of War Laufey has no firm release date but is expected to launch for PS5 in 2027 . While Kratos will show up for at least one scene in the game, Santa Monica Studio has reassured fans that the god-killing protagonist will return for more entries in the future .
paragraphs.cn: 《战神：劳菲》尚未确定发售日期，预计将于2027年登陆PS5。奎托斯会在游戏中至少一个场景里现身，圣莫妮卡工作室也向粉丝保证，这位弑神主角未来还会在更多作品中回归。

paragraphs.en: For more, you can read what God of War Laufey director Ariel Lawrence had to say to those who are skeptical following the new game's reveal. You can also check out IGN's interview with the team .
paragraphs.cn: 如需了解更多内容，可以阅读《战神：劳菲》导演Ariel Lawrence对新作公布后质疑者的回应，也可以查看IGN对开发团队的采访。
